Subject: RE: natasha

Ok, no worries! It's just that I can't send her there for nothing, she
is a
serious model and I needed to tell her it was for something...Actually I

just said Express, hadn't mentioned anything about Limited Brands, so
hopefully no harm done! Please pass this on to Jeffrey and tell him that
I
have cancelled.

can't do this...so sorry!

Thanks, Lesley

-----Original Message-----
From: Ramsey Elkholy [mailto:ramseyelkholy@hotmail.com]
Sent: Thursday, February 28, 2008 3:49 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: RE: natasha

Hi Lesley, I hope you read this before you leave for the day, some
info. to
pass on to Jeffrey.

The girl is coming to see him about the Express Campaign, casting for a
blonde. The shooting is in mid April for 3 days. All other details,
like

photographer, pay, etc... Jeffrey can defer to the people organizing
the

job.

I've sort of presented the situation as a "pre-casting" and she knows
that
Jeffrey is Limited Brands, so he can present her w any other
opportunity,
but it's important to talk about Express in the beginning because
that's

what I have told her she is going for.

Will call around 4-ish to confirm...

Thanks,
Ramsey

-----Original Message-----
From: Ramsey Elkholy [mailto:ramseyelkholy@hotmail.com]
Sent: Saturday, August 18, 2007 1:09 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Sylvia

Hi Lesley,
Below is an email sent to me by Syliva Geerson that sheds some
light
on

her situation at Next. Just want to keep Jeffrey in the loop. I'm
not

sure what the outcome of all this will be, whether Next will drop
her

or

not, but it seems that they might and it will probably be for the
best.

I just want Jeffrey to know that I did everything I could to
diffuse

the

s>situation and I have been on the side of Next from the start. The
"classes" she refers to are a pair of Armani Glasses that she
purchased

for 800.00 instead of paying me back some borrowed money, mainly a
1,500.00 phone bill.

Ramsy
About the classes ...i ask you ..do you have the bill yet you
say

yes

just

yesterday i will sens a coppy...i didn`t expect i will go to you
after
the

flihgt i had only 350 whit me and i buy the classes right after
i

landed

because they stole it from me it was a last seasons classes.....
please
send me a copy as soon as possible!
About leaving next was just the i was confused becuase my book
and

everything you my manager for that if i wanne have advice about
it

so

you

give it to me and i don`t leave next...you right about it they
did
a

lot

for me and even if i say things like im not sure about next is
just

because i wanne sucsede in my caraer and i need to hurry up...
x sylvia

-----Original Message-----
From: Ramsey Elkholy [mailto:ramseyelkholy@hotmail.com] 
Sent: Thursday, February 28, 2008 3:49 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: RE: natasha

Hi Lesley, I hope  you read this before you leave for the day, some
info. to 
pass on to Jeffrey.

The girl is coming to see him about the Express Campaign, casting for a 
blonde. The shooting is in mid April for 3 days. All other details, like

photographer, pay, etc... Jeffrey can defer to the people organizing the

job.

I've sort of presented the situation as a "pre-casting" and she knows
that 
Jeffrey is Limited Brands, so he can present her w any other
opportunity, 
but it's important to talk about Express in the beginning because that's

what I have told her she is going for.

Will call around 4-ish to confirm...

Thanks,
Ramsey
